'''''Star Wars: Rite of Passage''''' was a story arc of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' that consisted of 4 issues. It was also the last story arc to be released under ''Republic''{{'s}} former name, ''Star Wars''.

==Plot summary==
{{Plot}}

==Continuity==
{{Quote|No. I've followed Zao's example this past year or so, letting the Force lead me.|Quinlan Vos|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 43">[[Star Wars (1998) 43|''Star Wars'' (1998) 43]]</ref>}}
The original four issues of ''Star Wars: Republic: Rite of Passage'' each stated: "''The events in this series take place 30 years prior to [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Star Wars: A New Hope]]''." However, a quote made by [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] within [[Star Wars (1998) 43|''Star Wars'' (1998) 43]] places the events of this series at least a year after the events of a previous arc, ''[[Star Wars: Darkness]]'' which was also set in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]. Initial comments made by author [[John Ostrander]] via the [[Jedi Council Forums]] in [[2002]] initially placed ''Rite of Passage'' circa [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]],<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6857455|board=Literature|thread=The Official John Ostrander Discussion Thread|user=[[John Ostrander|jfostrander]]|date=2002-05-15|time=2:35 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20150911134032/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-john-ostrander-discussion-thread.5863919/page-2}}</ref> while both the [[first]] and [[second edition]] trade paperback collections, released in [[2004]], place ''Rite of Passage'': "approximately twenty-eight years before the events in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV A ''New Hope'']]." [[2007]]'s [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] further corroborated the [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]] date through the inclusion of comments, specifically dated at [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]],<ref name="JvSTEGttF" /> attributed to [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]], shortly before Quinlan Vos became a Jedi Master, as depicted in [[Star Wars (1998) 45|''Star Wars'' (1998) 45]]. Both ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'', published in [[2006]], and [[2010]]'s '''''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Quinlan Vos: Jedi in Darkness]]''''' once again erroneously placed ''Rite of Passage'' in [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]. The in-universe quotes by Quinlan and Tholme, both dictate that ''Rite of Passage'' takes place in 28 BBY. The scenes of the [[Star Wars (1998) 42|''Part 1'']] flashback that depict the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] infant [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura's]] discovery by Vos were conceived in their timeline placement to occur two years before the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], in [[46 BBY/Legends|46 BBY]], when Secura was two years old.
